0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Temporal Recall"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Time-aware scoring that boosts recent memories over older ones using exponential decay."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Formula"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"boost = exp(-hours_since_memory / halflife)\nfinal_score = score * (1.0 + temporal_weight * boost)\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Usage"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\nresults = query_time=\"2026-04-29T12:00:00\"\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Parameters"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.0"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.0
